tasks.subject: Task 1: Bootstrap + pure lib/quorum.ts helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bootstrap the fresh worktree, then add the pure quorum helper (validation bound + approval count) with unit tests.

**Files:** Create `.env` (gitignored), `lib/quorum.ts`, `tests/unit/quorum.test.ts`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Bootstrap: CI=true pnpm install; .env (AUTH_SECRET 32+, BASE_URL, DATABASE_URL=file:./data/app.db); pnpm db:deploy. No new migration.
- [ ] MAX_REQUIRED_APPROVALS=10; parseRequiredApprovals 1..10 else null, never throws.
- [ ] approvalCount = active APPROVE count.
- [ ] Unit-tested.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit quorum && npx tsc --noEmit

Full code in plan §Task 1. Shell: SCM Breeze breaks &&/heredocs → /usr/bin/git, separate calls, Write tool.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".env", "lib/quorum.ts", "tests/unit/quorum.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit quorum && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bootstrap ok", "parseRequiredApprovals 1..10 else null", "approvalCount active APPROVE", "unit-tested"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Set requiredApprovals at creation (lib + both POST routes + form)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Owner can set the threshold at document creation, web + machine APIs.

**Files:** lib/documents.ts, app/api/documents/route.ts, app/api/plans/route.ts, components/NewDocumentForm.tsx, tests/unit/documents.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] createDocument opts.requiredApprovals?, persists ?? 1.
- [ ] Both POST routes validate via parseRequiredApprovals → 400 if invalid; pass through; absent → 1.
- [ ] NewDocumentForm number input (min1 max10 default1, aria-label="required approvals").
- [ ] Unit test: persists 3; absent → 1.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit documents && npx tsc --noEmit

Full code in plan §Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/documents.ts", "app/api/documents/route.ts", "app/api/plans/route.ts", "components/NewDocumentForm.tsx", "tests/unit/documents.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit documents && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createDocument persists requiredApprovals default 1", "both POST routes validate + 400", "form input", "unit-tested"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: setRequiredApprovals service + extracted shared recompute
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Service updating threshold + recomputing state, sharing recompute with submitReview (behavior unchanged).

**Files:** lib/reviews.ts, tests/unit/reviews.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Shared recomputeState(documentId)→{state,prevState}; submitReview delegates, behavior unchanged (delete+create review, notifyParticipants, dispatch review.updated always + decision.changed on change).
- [ ] setRequiredApprovals(userId,documentId,n): update+recompute+publish review.updated+decision.changed on flip; NO notifyParticipants.
- [ ] Tests: raise→OPEN, lower→APPROVED, REQUEST_CHANGES stays, persisted.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit reviews && CI=true pnpm test:unit notifications.test && npx tsc --noEmit

Full code in plan §Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/reviews.ts", "tests/unit/reviews.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit reviews && CI=true pnpm test:unit notifications.test && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shared recomputeState; submitReview unchanged", "setRequiredApprovals recompute+publish+decision.changed, no notify", "raise/lower/REQUEST_CHANGES cases"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Dedicated settings routes (web + machine)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Owner-only PATCH endpoints exposing setRequiredApprovals on both surfaces.

**Files:** app/api/documents/[id]/settings/route.ts, app/api/plans/[id]/settings/route.ts, tests/unit/settings.quorum.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Web: requireUser; non-participant→404; non-owner→403; invalid→400; success→200 {ok,requiredApprovals,state} + persists.
- [ ] Machine: requireApiUser; non-owner→404; no plans:write→403; invalid→400; success→200 {requiredApprovals,state}.
- [ ] Unit tests 200/400/403/404 (web).

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit settings.quorum && npx tsc --noEmit

Full code in plan §Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/settings/route.ts", "app/api/plans/[id]/settings/route.ts", "tests/unit/settings.quorum.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit settings.quorum && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["web 200/400/403/404 + persists", "machine 200/400/403(scope)/404", "unit-tested"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Display N-of-M approvals + owner threshold control
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface approval progress + owner inline threshold control in the document view.

**Files:** app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx, components/DocumentView.tsx.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ClientDocument gains requiredApprovals+approvals; page maps doc.requiredApprovals + approvalCount(doc.reviews).
- [ ] "{approvals} of {requiredApprovals} approvals" (data-testid="approval-progress") by the state badge.
- [ ] Owner-only number input (aria-label="required approvals", data-testid="required-approvals", min1 max10) PATCHes /api/documents/[id]/settings + updates badge from returned state; not gated by EDIT_UI_ENABLED.
- [ ] Existing test hooks preserved; tsc 0, lint 0.

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm lint

Full code in plan §Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx", "components/DocumentView.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ClientDocument threaded", "approval-progress N of M", "owner required-approvals input PATCHes + updates badge", "hooks preserved"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Surface threshold + approvals in feedback contract
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add requiredApprovals + approvals to consolidateFeedback for the agent loop.

**Files:** lib/feedback.ts, tests/unit/feedback.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Return includes requiredApprovals + approvals (=approvalCount(detail.reviews)).
- [ ] markdown includes "Approvals: {approvals} of {requiredApprovals}".
- [ ] schemaVersion stays 1 (additive).
- [ ] Unit-tested.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit feedback && npx tsc --noEmit

Full code in plan §Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/feedback.ts", "tests/unit/feedback.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit feedback && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["return has requiredApprovals + approvals", "markdown 'Approvals: N of M'", "schemaVersion 1", "unit-tested"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: E2E + full verification gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the quorum flow end-to-end + whole suite green.

**Files:** tests/e2e/quorum.spec.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] E2E: owner creates doc requiredApprovals=2; non-owner reviewer approves → Open + "1 of 2" (after reload); owner lowers to 1 → Approved.
- [ ] Full gate green: CI=true pnpm test:unit; pnpm test:e2e; pnpm lint; npx tsc --noEmit; pnpm build 0/0.

**Verify:** all five commands green.

Full code in plan §Task 7. Leave branch ready to fast-forward into local main (no push/PR).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/quorum.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm build && (lsof -ti tcp:3000 | xargs -r kill -9; pnpm test:e2e)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["e2e 2-approval gate", "unit+e2e+lint+tsc+build green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
